name.description: Name of the Signal Store Feature.

project.description: The name of the project in which to place the Signal Store Feature.  Valid project types are: app, data-access, feature, utils and ui.
project.x-prompt: What project would you like to add the Signal Store Feature to?

directory.description: A directory where the signal store feature is placed.  If not provided, the Signal Store Feature will be placed in the 'features' folder relative to the source root of the project.

export.description: Whether to export the generated file as part of the public API of the project.
